article.title: Anthropic's Claude Code had a workspace trust bypass (CVE-2026-33068). Not a prompt injection or AI attack. A configuration loading order bug. Fixed in 2.1.53.

caption:
BREAKING: Anthropic's Claude Code had a workspace trust bypass (CVE-2026-33068). Not a prompt injection or AI attack. A configuration loading order bug. Fixed in 2.1.53.
